infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Opturna uses the camera to capture photos inside the app before you publish them.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Opturna uses the microphone to record audio clips that stay with your in-app creations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Opturna accesses your photo library to let you choose media that appears in the app.
